content.text: I'll create the Phase 2 Risk & Compliance Framework document for OpenClaw Legal Suite. This is a critical

arguments.task: Create a comprehensive Phase 2 Risk & Compliance Framework document for OpenClaw Legal Suite covering: 1) AI liability risks (hallucinations in legal context, mitigation strategies), 2) Data privacy compliance (ABA rules, state bar regulations, GDPR), 3) HIPAA considerations if healthcare vertical pursued, 4) Competitive response scenarios (Clio/Smokeball AI features), 5) Technical risks (API cost spikes, dependency management). Output should be a risk register with severity, probability, and mitigation strategies. Store in ~/openclaw-core/data/phase2/risk-framework.md
arguments.quality_criteria: Document must include: professional legal industry standard formatting, specific regulatory citations where applicable, actionable mitigation strategies, proper risk matrix with severity/probability ratings (Critical/High/Medium/Low), competitive analysis context, and clear ownership/accountability for each risk area. Must be suitable for legal review and board presentation.
